meta.title: NemoFish - Predict Everything
meta.description: NemoFish - Social Media Opinion Simulation System

home.heroDesc: Upload a document and a simulation prompt, and {brand} builds a knowledge graph and simulates reactions with Korean agents grounded in Nemotron-Personas-Korea.
home.systemReadyDesc: Prediction engine on standby. Upload unstructured data to initialize a simulation sequence.
home.step01Desc: Seed extraction & memory injection & GraphRAG construction
home.step02Desc: Entity extraction & persona generation & Agent config injection
home.step03Desc: Dual-platform parallel sim & auto-parse requirements & temporal memory
home.step04Desc: ReportAgent interacts with the post-simulation environment via rich tools
home.step05Desc: Chat with any simulated individual & converse with ReportAgent
home.promptPlaceholder: // Describe your simulation or prediction requirement in natural language
home.designdbHint: Search designdb with your product description to pick relevant articles/reports as seed background.
home.designdbClickToRead: Click an article to read its full text here.
home.designdbNoneSelected: Click items on the right to select them.

step1.ontologyDesc: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts reality seeds, and auto-generates a suitable ontology structure
step1.graphRagDesc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are auto-chunked and sent to Zep to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations, forming temporal memory and community summaries
step1.buildCompleteDesc: Graph build is complete. Proceed to the next step for simulation environment setup.

step2.simInstanceDesc: Create a new simulation instance and pull world parameter templates
step2.generateAgentPersonaDesc: Samples statistically-grounded synthetic Korean personas from the NVIDIA Nemotron-Personas-Korea dataset (1M profiles, optionally filtered by demographics) to build the simulation agents, each with unique behavior and memory grounded in demographics, occupation, and interests
step2.dualPlatformConfigDesc: LLM intelligently sets world time flow, recommendation algorithms, each individual's active hours, posting frequency, event triggers, and more based on requirements and reality seeds
step2.initialActivationDesc: Auto-generate initial activation events and hot topics based on narrative direction to guide the simulation world's initial state
step2.setupCompleteDesc: Simulation environment is ready. You can now start the simulation.
step2.roundsConfigDesc: NemoFish auto-plans to simulate {hours} real-world hours, each round representing {minutesPerRound} minutes of elapsed time
step2.customTip: For first-time runs, we strongly recommend switching to 'Custom Mode' to reduce rounds for a quick preview and lower error risk
step2.personaDimExperienceDesc: Complete behavioral trajectory in this event
step2.filterMatchWarning: Only {matched} personas match (requested {count}) — all will be used

step3.oldSimCleared: Old simulation logs cleared, restarting simulation
step3.preparingGoBack: Preparing to return to Step 2, closing simulation...
step3.closeFailed: Failed to close simulation environment, attempting force stop...

step4.panelKeyFacts: Latest key facts from temporal memory

step5.chatWithAgent: Chat with any individual in the world
step5.reportAgentDesc: A conversational version of the report generation agent with access to 4 professional tools and NemoFish's complete memory
step5.toolInsightForgeDesc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation state, combining Global/Local Memory for cross-temporal deep attribution analysis
step5.toolPanoramaSearchDesc: Graph-based BFS algorithm that reconstructs event propagation paths, capturing the full topology of information flow
step5.toolQuickSearchDesc: GraphRAG-based instant query interface with optimized indexing for fast extraction of node attributes and discrete facts
step5.toolInterviewSubAgentDesc: Autonomous interviews that conduct parallel multi-round dialogues with simulated individuals, collecting unstructured opinion data and psychological states
step5.chatEmptyReportAgent: Chat with Report Agent to explore report content in depth
step5.chatEmptyAgent: Chat with simulated individuals to understand their perspectives
step5.surveyInputPlaceholder: Enter the question you want to ask all selected targets...
step5.selectAgentFirst: Please select a simulated individual first

graph.graphMemoryRealtime: GraphRAG short/long-term memory updating in real-time
graph.pendingContentHint: Some content is still processing. Consider refreshing the graph manually later.

history.title: Simulation History
history.replayHint: Step 3 'Run Simulation' and Step 5 'Deep Interaction' must be started during runtime and do not support history replay

api.projectDeleteFailed: Project not found or deletion failed: {id}
api.requireFileUpload: Please upload at least one document file
api.noDocProcessed: No documents were processed successfully. Please check file formats.
api.ontologyNotGenerated: Ontology not yet generated. Please call /ontology/generate first.
api.graphBuilding: Graph build in progress. Do not resubmit. To force rebuild, add force: true.
api.graphBuildStarted: Graph build task started. Query progress via /task/{taskId}.
api.graphNotBuilt: Graph not yet built. Please call /api/graph/build first.
api.prepareStarted: Preparation task started. Query progress via /api/simulation/prepare/status.
api.alreadyPrepared: Preparation already complete. No need to regenerate.
api.configNotFound: Simulation config not found. Please call /prepare first.
api.configFileNotFound: Config file not found. Please call /prepare first.
api.maxRoundsPositive: max_rounds must be a positive integer
api.maxRoundsInvalid: max_rounds must be a valid integer
api.simRunningForceHint: Simulation is running. Stop it first via /stop, or use force=true to restart.
api.simNotReady: Simulation not ready. Current status: {status}. Please call /prepare first.
api.graphIdRequiredForMemory: Graph memory update requires a valid graph_id. Ensure the graph is built.
api.dbNotExist: Database does not exist. The simulation may not have run yet.
api.missingGraphIdEnsure: Missing graph ID. Please ensure the graph has been built.
api.reportGenerateStarted: Report generation task started. Query progress via /api/report/generate/status.
api.noReportForSim: No report found for this simulation: {id}
api.reportProgressNotAvail: Report not found or progress unavailable: {id}
api.envNotRunning: Simulation environment not running or closed. Ensure simulation is complete and in command-wait mode.
api.interviewListInvalidPlatform: Interview list item {index} platform must be 'twitter' or 'reddit'
api.envRunning: Environment is running and ready for Interview commands
api.requireApiKey: Cloud mode requires both an OpenAI key and a Voyage key

progress.waitingZepProcess: Waiting for Zep to process data...
progress.waitingEpisodes: Waiting for {count} text chunks to process...
progress.generatingEventConfig: Generating event config and hot topics...
progress.zepSearchQuery: All information, activities, events, relationships and background about {name}

log.preparingGoBack: Preparing to return to Step 2, closing simulation...
log.closeSimEnvFailed: Failed to close simulation environment, attempting force stop...
log.timeConfigFetchFailed: Failed to fetch time config, using default: {minutes} min/round
log.detectedExistingPrep: Detected existing preparation, using it directly
log.generatingLLMConfig: Calling LLM to generate simulation config parameters...
log.envSetupComplete: ✓ Environment setup complete, ready to simulate
log.oldSimCleared: ✓ Old simulation logs cleared, restarting simulation
log.reportRequestSent: Report generation request sent, please wait...

report.sectionConflict: Section {title} round {iteration}: LLM output both tool call and Final Answer (conflict #{conflictCount})
report.sectionConflictDowngrade: Section {title}: {conflictCount} consecutive conflicts, downgrading to truncate and execute first tool call
report.multiToolOnlyFirst: LLM attempted {total} tool calls, executing only the first: {toolName}
report.sectionNoPrefix: Section {title} missing 'Final Answer:' prefix, adopting LLM output as final content (tool calls: {count})
report.sectionMaxIter: Section {title} reached max iterations, forcing generation
report.sectionForceFailed: Section {title} force-finish LLM returned None, using default error message
report.sectionGenFailedContent: (This section failed to generate: LLM returned empty response, please retry later)

console.zepSearchApiFallback: Zep Search API failed, falling back to local search: {error}
console.localSearchComplete: Local search complete: found {count} relevant facts
console.generateSubQueriesFailed: Failed to generate sub-queries: {error}, using defaults
console.callingBatchInterviewApi: Calling batch interview API (dual platform): {count} agents
console.interviewApiCallFailed: Interview API call failed (env not running?): {error}
console.llmSelectAgentFailed: LLM agent selection failed, using default selection: {error}

uiMain.logNoPendingFiles: Error: No pending files found for new project.
uiMain.logBuildTaskStarted: Graph build task started. Task ID: {taskId}

uiProcess.waitingOntologyHint: Graph building will start automatically once generation is complete
uiProcess.ontologyApiDesc: After uploading documents, the LLM analyzes their content and automatically generates an ontology structure (entity types + relation types) suitable for opinion simulation
uiProcess.buildApiDesc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are chunked and the Zep API is called to build the knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations
uiProcess.waitingOntologyComplete: Waiting for ontology generation to complete...
uiProcess.noPendingFiles: No pending files to upload, please return to home and try again
